title: Non-compliant matching JSON: fanciful name in class field 'Volcano Fire' (overexposed, level 5, upright)

form_data.reason: Fanciful or invented designations like 'Volcano Fire' are not approved classes.

image_prompt: Photorealistic dark textured glass bottle with a red and orange glowing label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Lava Rock', 'Volcano Fire', '35% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Produced and bottled by Island Distillers, Hilo, HI'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Readable photo: bright lighting but label text remains legible. Camera orientation is upright (0 degrees).
